items.title: Alcaraz, Sabalenka, PSG win top Laureus awards
items.summary: Tennis players Carlos Alcaraz and Aryna Sabalenka were named Sportsman and Sportswoman of the Year at the Laureus awards on Monday while Paris Saint-Germain was the Team of the...

items.title: Haaland's partner not happy with game 'scratches'
items.summary: Erling Haaland has joked that his partner "isn't happy" about the number of scratches on his body after the physical battles with Premier League defenders.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Big Bets Report: Bettor's Huge PGA Wager Cashes in for $650k
items.summary: One bettor's big wager on the PGA tour paid off to the tune of $650k. Patrick Everson breaks down that bet and more.
